parameters.description: Send notifications to your own D7 Networks destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise d7sms:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a D7 Networks Messages API JSON body and post it to rest-api.d7networks.com (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"message_globals":{"channel":"sms","originator":"${ customer_secrets.D7NETWORKS_SMS_FROM }"},"messages":[{"recipients":["${ customer_secrets.D7NETWORKS_SMS_TO }"],"content":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and ": " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *},"data_coding":"auto"}]}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to D7 Networks messages/v1/send (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment D7 Networks destinations, direct

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's D7 Networks targets

token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's D7 Networks token
